name: Stir Fried Spinach with Fermented Bean Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1 cube white fermented bean curd (fu ru)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove and discard the tough stems from the spinach.
2. Wash and rinse spinach thoroughly. Remove excess water using a lettuce spinner.
3. Preheat a wok over medium heat and add oil, ginger, garlic, and salt. When oil becomes fragrant, increase heat to high.
4. Add the spinach in large handfuls, seconds apart; stir-fry until leaves are wilted.
5. Mash the fermented bean curd and mix it with the sugar. Push the spinach aside and place the bean curd mixture in the center of the wok.
6. Stir together over high heat until the spinach is cooked. Serve immediately.
7. Chinese water spinach may be cooked in the same manner, using only about 2 inches of the tender hollow stems.
Nutritional Information:
- Per serving: 70 calories, 3g protein, 5g carbohydrate, 5g fat (1g saturated), 0mg cholesterol, 227mg sodium, 3g fiber.
